channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260311.1)
item.description:
What's New

feat: Add translate-to-source hotkey with glassmorphism result overlay

  • Add new hotkey to translate selected text back to source language
  • Create TranslationResultOverlay with glassmorphism UI (ultraThinMaterial)
  • Overlay features: copy button, font size +/- controls, close button
  • Draggable header and resizable window (min 200x80, max 600x500)
  • Configurable auto-hide timer with countdown progress bar (0 = no auto-hide)
  • Fade in/out animations, screen bounds clamping
  • Add translateToSourceHotkey and translationResultAutoHideSeconds to Preferences
  • Add corresponding keys and computed properties to SharedSettings
  • Add hotkey detection in EventTapManager
  • Update TranslationSection UI with new hotkey recorder and auto-hide input
  • Update README.md to document new translation features

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
